summary: End-to-end tested TomIT Solution: backend pytest (16/16 passing) + Playwright UI flows (quote with real file upload, contact, admin login/leads/stats/file thumbnail/status update). All review-requested flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/App.js is 1533 lines - should be split into per-view modules (HomeView, QuoteView, AdminView, etc.) to stay under 700-line guideline and ease maintenance.
backend/server.py has a fallback default JWT_SECRET hardcoded - should be required from env (fail fast) to avoid running with predictable secret if env is missing.
backend stats endpoint loads all quotes into memory (to_list(1000)) just to sum estimated_total - prefer a MongoDB aggregation ($group/$sum) for scalability.

Object storage init runs lazily; if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is missing init_storage() raises - good, but startup logs a generic error and the API will still 500 on uploads. Consider surfacing this in a /api/health endpoint.
/api/quotes is fully public with no rate limiting and no captcha - susceptible to spam. Recommend adding throttling.
File download serves bytes via memory; for large files prefer streaming response.
seed_data_creation: Created during testing: 1 PNG file uploaded via /api/uploads, 1 quote (TEST_UI_Client) with that file attached, 1 contact (TEST_UI_ContactName), backend pytest also creates and cleans up TEST_ prefixed quotes/contacts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (16 cases, pytest, all green). They are self-cleaning for TEST_ prefixed docs. Frontend admin login uses cookie auth (axios.defaults.withCredentials=true). Admin file thumbnails work via relying on httpOnly access_token cookie (verified naturalWidth>0). The earlier test_backend.py had stale uploaded_files schema (string instead of object) - replaced with correct schema matching UploadedFileRef.
rca_of_the_issue: Old test_backend.py was failing because it sent uploaded_files as a list of strings, but the QuoteCreate model expects a list of UploadedFileRef objects. Rewrote tests to cover full upload->quote->admin-fetch chain. No app code changes were needed.
